servicePage.orderDescription: Leave your details and we'll get in touch with you.

website.heroDescription: We create professional websites that bring customers, build trust, and deliver results. Every site is built on a strategy.
website.detail1Desc: A modern, fast-loading website that fully represents your brand. Mobile-responsive and user-friendly.
website.detail2Desc: A complete website that professionally presents all information about your company. Services, team, portfolio, and contact pages.
website.detail3Desc: We optimize the interface and navigation to improve user experience and convert more visitors into customers.
website.detail4Desc: We implement basic SEO and technical optimizations so your site ranks well on Google and loads fast.
website.why1: 3+ years of experience and 10+ successful projects
website.why2: Strategy-driven approach — every site is focused on results
website.why3: 12 months of technical support and monitoring

crm.whyTitle: Why do you need CRM / ERP?
crm.heroDescription: We build systems that organize and automate your business processes. Manage customers, orders, and internal operations from one place.
crm.detail1Desc: Track your customer base, sales status, history, and communications — all in one system to boost efficiency.
crm.detail2Desc: Automate finance, inventory, HR, and other internal processes. All data in one place, decisions made faster.
crm.detail3Desc: Admin panel for convenient data management and an analytics dashboard for deep insights.
crm.detail4Desc: Integrate with Telegram, payment systems, email, and other services to fully automate your system.
crm.why1: Custom solution — tailored to your specific business
crm.why2: Scalable architecture — grows with your business

telegram.whyTitle: Why do you need a Telegram bot?
telegram.heroDescription: We create Telegram bots that work 24/7 with customers, automate sales, and accelerate your business.
telegram.detail1Desc: Automatically collect potential customer data and save to database. Establish initial contact through the bot.
telegram.detail2Desc: Product catalog, order processing, and payment flow — all managed entirely through the bot.
telegram.detail3Desc: Integration with Click, Payme, Uzum, and other payment systems. Customers pay directly inside the bot.
telegram.detail4Desc: Automatically forward orders and customer data from the bot to your CRM system for tracking.
telegram.why1: Telegram is the most popular messenger in Uzbekistan — your customers are here
telegram.why2: Works 24/7 — even on weekends and at night

seo.heroDescription: We build SEO strategies that bring free traffic and customers through Google. Your site will rank higher in search results.
seo.detail1Desc: We find the most effective keywords for your business. We analyze what's working for your competitors.
seo.detail2Desc: We write professional content optimized for search engines. Content strategy for blog and pages.
seo.detail3Desc: We audit and improve your site's technical SEO health: meta tags, structure, internal links, speed.
seo.detail4Desc: Through monthly monitoring and analysis, we continuously improve your site's positions.
seo.why1: Google traffic is free and permanent — works even when ads stop
seo.why2: Data-driven approach — every step backed by analysis
